criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: The range and effectiveness of AI-powered functionalities offered by the app, such as automatic enhancements, style transfers, and object recognition.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, and official websites.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, interface design, and user satisfaction with the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, and usability studies.

criteria.name: Performance
criteria.description: The speed, stability, and efficiency of the app during operation.
criteria.sources: Performance benchmarks, user feedback, and technical reviews.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: The availability of the app across different operating systems and devices.
criteria.sources: Official app stores and developer websites.

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: The pricing model of the app, including free tiers, subscriptions, and one-time purchases.
criteria.sources: App store listings and official pricing pages.
